steps.title: Read the actual data point at x = 1
steps.content: From the scatterplot, locate the data point at $x = 1$. It sits at approximately $y = 11$ on the vertical axis.

steps.title: Read the line of best fit at x = 1
steps.content: The line of best fit at $x = 1$ passes through approximately $y = 10.5$ (just above the $y = 10$ gridline).

steps.title: Compute the difference and match to a choice
steps.content:
The residual (difference) is:
$$|11 - 10.5| = 0.5$$
Among the choices, find the one closest to 0.5:
  • A — 1: distance from 0.5 is 0.5. This is the closest value. That matches choice A — A is correct.
  • B — 2: distance from 0.5 is 1.5. Much farther.
  • C — 5: distance from 0.5 is 4.5. Far off.
  • D — 12: distance from 0.5 is 11.5. Not close at all.
